summary: Frontend-only testing of new Kurate.org homepage at '/'. All 13 requested features verified working. TopNav, HeroPanel (search/filters/live leaderboard), Quick Categories, Metrics strip, Recent Rankings, FAQ accordion, and SiteFooter all render correctly. Existing routes (/leaderboard, /methodology, /admin, /paper/:id) still render with the existing Navbar and load correctly. Backend homepage API (/api/homepage/papers, /metrics, /categories) returning real data — 11,142 papers, 21 categories, 274,905 comparisons, 3 AI judges. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage `/` route in App.js correctly bypasses Navbar and renders TopNav + SiteFooter only — clean separation.
TopNav anchor links (#rankings, #categories, #faq, #about) only work on homepage; clicking them on other pages would 404 — currently OK because TopNav is homepage-only.
HeroPanel.jsx `filterParams` variable (line 108) is computed but never used — dead code, minor cleanup suggestion.
Console shows pre-existing CSP violations for third-party analytics (gtag, twitter, reddit, plausible, cloudflare) — unrelated to this feature.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage at '/' uses TopNav + SiteFooter (no Navbar). All other routes use Navbar. data-testid attributes available: topnav-logo, topnav-{rankings|categories|methodology|faq|about}, topnav-explore-btn, hero-panel, hero-search (on the <input> itself, use input[data-testid='hero-search']), hero-category-select, hero-period-select, hero-ranktype-select, hero-leaderboard, hero-metrics, hero-search-btn, hero-methodology-link, hero-full-leaderboard-link, hero-view-all-link, chip-all, chip-cs.LG, chip-stat.ML, chip-cs.RO, chip-quant-ph, chip-cs.CR, chip-q-bio.BM, chip-cs.GT, chip-cs.DC, paper-link-{1..8}. Homepage backend endpoints respond correctly with live data.

verified_features.metrics_strip_4_tiles: 11,142 Papers Ranked | 21 Active Categories | 274,905 Comparisons | 3 AI Judges
